attributes.action: Change school opening times to 10 and leave at 4
attributes.additional_details: We urge the government and education authorities to pilot later school starts times, such as 10.00am-4.00pm, in both primary and secondary schools. This should include reviewing impacts on students wellbeing, academic performance, attendance, and mental health, while working with parents and schools to address transport, childcare, and scheduling challenges
attributes.background: Research from Switzerland and south Korea shows that later school starts times improve sleep, focus, wellbeing and academic performance. As teenagers are naturally predisposed to sleep later, early start times can reduce rest and negatively impact learning.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Require all schools to start at 10AM
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756158
